name: SiliconFlow
steps: Visit SiliconFlow Cloud and register (supports email, SMS, GitHub, Google)
Click "Create API Key" and copy it (format: sk-...)
Paste it above and click "Validate & Save"
Note: Keys from cloud.siliconflow.com use the api.siliconflow.com endpoint. Keys from cloud.siliconflow.cn use api.siliconflow.cn.
notes: Free tier: select open-source models (3 RPS, 100 RPM). Qwen 2.5 7B is free.
